title: oxyspora microflora
intro: Oxyspora microflora is a type of plant species, also known as the "Mountain Gold" or "Huang Jing", that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oxyspora microflora include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, making it a popular treatment for respiratory infections. Oxyspora microflora can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
